approach: population = external subjects + self-dogfood ACED skill nodes
run output out of spec tree, gitignored via init-aced
discovery reuses SDD spec-location conventions + eval.md marker

note: 304-M3 design decision (todo 1) settled by owner. (1) Population: external subjects plus self-dogfood ACED skill nodes, delivered one node at a time. (2) Run output at .agents/aced/results/<target>/ out of the spec tree, git-ignored, ignore rule written idempotently by init-aced. (3) Discovery reuses SDD spec-location conventions (ADR-0019 anchors) plus the eval.md marker; no ACED-specific path constant, satisfying issue 356's don't-hard-pin concern.
